Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Calendar.PlanLink

Contains information about plan connected to the event.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
PlanId

The plan identifier.

 integer

None.
PlanName

The plan name.

 string

None.
TopicName

The topic name.

 string

None.
Url

The url to view plan in itslearning.

 string
